sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112772" key="futoskafi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῠτοσκᾰφία</orth>, poet. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῠτοκομ-ίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n112772.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gardening,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.202</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
